description: Core baselines (EXP-104, 14 configs). 9/12 jobs ok, 3 n=256 timed out. 126 audit records. Key: full_action dominates at n=128 (frob=1.368, sigma_ratio=0.294, gap_ratio=5.79). full_all second (frob=1.196). Baseline frob peaks at n=128 (0.666). 7/14 configs identical to baseline (inert cells confirmed).

Single-cell utility (EXP-100, 13 configs). 9/12 jobs ok, 3 n=256 timed out. 117 audit records. Key: No individual P1/P2-row cell improves frob vs baseline at n=64. A3 (RM-rewrite) best individual at n=128 (frob=1.054). All cells have moderate effects that diminish at scale.

Producer/consumer chains (EXP-102, EXP-103). 12/12 jobs ok. 96 audit records. Key: LensSelector has ZERO effect (MaxFrob=MaxGap=MinRM). full_action_safe best (frob=1.391 n=128). A16 helps at n=128 (0.930 vs 0.602-0.683 for A14/A15/A17). full_lens strong (frob=1.116 n=128).

Full system decomposition (EXP-105, 15 configs). 6/9 jobs ok, 3 n=256 timed out. 90 audit records. Key: P1_row_A13 best combo (frob=1.019 n=128). A13_A18_A19 sigma-killing only at n=64 (frob=1.536), NOT at n=128 (0.954). A3_A13 strong at n=128 (frob=1.005). Packaging combos A11_A22/A11_A21 active but sub-baseline frob.

Scale/phase behavior (EXP-106, EXP-107). 20/40 jobs ok, 20 n=256 timed out. 260 audit records. Key: full_action dominates at n=128 (frob=1.467, 10 seeds). Boost parameter 0.1-4.0 has ZERO effect. A13_A14_A19 strong (frob=1.213). sigma_ratio converges to ~0.004 for all except full_action (0.294). n=256 data missing (all timed out).

Campaign synthesis (37 findings, 736 audit records, 68 configs). Full mechanistic chain: A13->traj->P2->edges->eff_gap->[REV/NRM bifurcation]. Two qualitative regimes: 11 normal configs (frob log-linear, slope 0.47-0.53) vs full_action (flat slope 0.16, locked gap~0.39). REV is exact microscopic reversibility (sigma_pi=0 at ALL k). REV/NRM split is seed x config interaction, not seed quality. 5 candidate theorems proposed.

Stage 05 update: EXP-106 post-review n=128 data (seeds 3-9, 91 records). RETRACTION: boost resonance was data-mixing artifact (intermediate + post-review binary). No EXP-106 config has significant sigma_ratio signal vs baseline (all p>0.45 Mann-Whitney). A13_A14_A19 frob=1.376 (+43%, p=0.001) — highest 3-cell frob. A21 inertness re-confirmed (bit-exact with A18). Total stage 05 audits now 273. n=256 jobs still running.

Stage 03 update: EXP-103 s8/s9 completed (10/10 seeds). Critical correction: A14_only frob=1.327 median (70% >1.0 at n=128). Partition competition is the primary frob mechanism, not A13 keystone. 3-seed bias was severe. All P4-row lenses independently boost frob. Total stage 03 audits now 146.

metrics.correction: A14 reclassified from harmful to strongest booster

description: n=256 preliminary analysis (F42-F45). Data: old-binary EXP-107v2 (80 macro records, 11 configs, 9-10 seeds) + new-binary EXP-106 backups (8 records, 4 configs, 3 seeds). Key findings: (F42) ALL non-full configs converge to frob≈0.52, effect space compressed 6x. (F43) full_action maintains 2.05x (frob=1.075). (F44) REV→NRM complete: 0/9 sigma=0, but sigma=0.014 (13x below baseline). (F45) sigma_u≠sigma_pi in new binary (old bug confirmed). EXP-103 n=256 (lens configs) imminent; EXP-106 n=256 (full sweep) ~50% through.

EXP-103 n=256 COMPLETE (3 seeds × 8 configs = 24 records). CAMPAIGN'S MOST IMPORTANT FINDING (F46 CONFIRMED): Partition competition SURVIVES at n=256 with frob INCREASING from n=128. A14_only: 3/3 seeds >1.0 (median 1.157, CV=0.04, 128→256 ratio 1.20). A16_only: 3/3 >1.0 (1.171, CV=0.02, ratio 1.29). A17_only: 2/3 >1.0 (1.372, CV=0.25, ratio 1.49). full_lens=A16_only (A16 wins selector all seeds). A15_only=0.544 (baseline decay 0.59). Single lens cells EXCEED full_action (1.08) at n=256. Refutes universal convergence (F42/HYP-201).

EXP-106 n=256 completion audit (2026-02-23T17:00Z). Batch timeout (86400s) killed all n=256 jobs before completion. Per-seed status: seeds 0-7,9 completed 9/13 configs each (main logs); seed 8 completed 6/13 (backup log only, no main log). Total: 87/130 config-seed pairs done. MISSING CONFIGS: A13_A21_A19 (10 seeds), chain_A24 (10 seeds), chain_pkg (10 seeds), chain_SBRC (10 seeds) — these are the 4 slowest configs. Seed 8 additionally missing: A13_A14_A19, A13_A3_A19, boost_4.0. Also: n=128 seeds 0-2 incomplete (5/13, 3/13, 5/13) — from pre-fix binary, partial runs. n=128 seeds 3-9 and n=64 seeds 0-2 are complete. Three redundant backup processes (seeds 0,1,8) killed. To complete: 43 individual n=256 config-seed runs + 28 n=128 seed 0-2 runs (or re-run seeds 0-2 from scratch).

Comprehensive wave_1 reanalysis (post-19-fix binary) completed on canonical regenerated dataset: 1470 logs, 1890 rich audits. Hypothesis outcomes: supported={HYP-202,HYP-204}, refuted={HYP-137,HYP-138,HYP-139,HYP-203,HYP-205}, open={HYP-131}, partially_supported={HYP-130}. Key changes vs pre-fix characterization: REV chain claims do not replicate; partition-competition configs lead n=128 global frob ranking; budget saturation remains strongly associated with REV.

Wave_1 hypothesis re-evaluation rerun under strict preregistered criteria (Bonferroni 0.0125 for HYP-202..205, effect-size thresholds, BH-FDR control for HYP-130 multi-test sweep, fixed-k primary framing for HYP-203, and conjunction logic for HYP-139). Verdict set is unchanged for HYP-137/138/139/202/203/204/205; HYP-130 evidence strength is reduced from 6/12 to 2/12 distinct single-cell signatures.

Physics Emergence Synthesis from Wave 1 post-fix dataset. Five major findings established: (1) Classical Limit via saddle-point dominated paths (PLA2 gap shrinks), (2) Macroscopic Conservation Laws via timescale separation (gap_ratio shrinks), (3) Universality via partition competition outperforming the full system at scale, (4) Decoupling of reversibility from structure (REV collapses at n=128 but structure remains high), and (5) Non-trivial emergent geometry that resists simple diffusion or continuous Lagrangian models. All preregistered statistical thresholds met.

Critical Review of Wave 1 results identified Structural Interference: engineered static configurations (like A14_only winning over full_action) reveal that activating all primitives simultaneously degrades structure. The campaign must pivot to studying autonomous convergence, such as the P4-native LensSelector in EXP-103, to prove the system can resolve this interference using strictly internal feedback loops.

metrics.next_steps: Require autonomous P4-driven convergence to prove unguided emergence

description: Retracted due to overly broad physics terminology. Superseded by RES-202-P1P6-SYNTHESIS grounded strictly in P1-P6 mechanics.

Wave 1 Synthesis grounded strictly in P1-P6 mechanics. Five mechanistic pillars established: (1) P4 Path Condensation (PLA2 gap shrinks, confirming path measure concentration), (2) P4 Timescale Separation (gap_ratio shrinks, showing slow relaxation modes), (3) P4 Dominance at Scale (minimal partition competition out-structures the full system), (4) P6 Reversibility Independence (REV collapses at n=128 without degrading P4 frob), and (5) P4 Kernel Geometry Bounds (macro-kernels do not map to simple diffusion models). All preregistered statistical thresholds met.
